title: CSS Layout Techniques Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential historical and modern methods for building layouts using CSS.

questions.question: Which of these is the most modern and recommended way to build a two-dimensional layout?
Which of these is the primary reason the 'Float' layout method reached 'obsolete' status?
options: Floats were difficult to manage because they required complex 'clearfixes' to prevent layout collapse.
They were only supported in Firefox.
They made the text too large.

questions.question: Which layout model is best for a one-dimensional row of items, like a navbar?
What is the name of the layout technique where you use CSS to make text flow between several columns automatically, like a newspaper?
Modern layouts must be 'Responsive,' which means they should ________ to every device size.
